name: vault
description: The knowledge-vault skill: capture knowledge and tasks into a personal LLM wiki and query the compiled notes, through the vault's MCP connector.

mcp_url.title: Knowledge vault MCP URL
mcp_url.description: Your self-hosted knowledge-vault MCP connector endpoint, including the /mcp path (e.g. https://knowledge.example.com/mcp). OAuth is negotiated automatically on first connect; IdPs without dynamic client registration need a .mcp.json (see the plugin README).
